ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "code" TEXT /* Stock code or ticker symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "p_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price on that date */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Total turnover of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded on that date */,
  "t_volume" REAL /* Total trading volume across all trades */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock after the market closes */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price of the stock for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being analyzed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on that date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock after the market closes */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price of the stock for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trader account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the trader's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trader account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader involved in the session */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken during the session (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trading session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trading session was last updated */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trading session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "base_year" INTEGER /* Base year used for calculating the index */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the market index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the index value was last updated */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the index value since the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author of the article */,
  "related_stocks" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of stock codes related to the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader performing the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity (e.g., log in, view report) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was triggered */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being predicted */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price for the stock */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyst making the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_used FOREIGN KEY ("model_used") REFERENCES predictive_models ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise for the analyst */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analyst account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the analyst's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the analyst account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the notification */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time when the exchange opens */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time when the exchange closes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "stock_exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock-exchange relationship */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange */,
  "primary_listing" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if it is the primary listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchanges_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchanges_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the predictive model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
